text: L3AI turns Web3 uncertainty into a guided product journey
textPreview: L3AI turns Web3 uncertainty into a guided product journey

text:
Product story, commercial logic and trust boundary for external review
面向外部评审的产品叙事、商业逻辑与信任边界
textPreview: Product story, commercial logic and trust boundary for external review | 面向外部评审的产品叙事、商业逻辑与信任边界

text: This deck replaces a documentation-style roadshow draft with a product-led business story.
textPreview: This deck replaces a documentation-style roadshow draft with a product-led business story.

text: Open by saying that this is the rebuilt external presentation. It starts from what a visitor can experience on the public L3AI site, then connects that journey to the business model, roadmap and review ask.
The buyer problem is not access. It is confidence.
textPreview: The buyer problem is not access. It is confidence.

text: Web3 users and partners can find data everywhere. The hard part is deciding what to trust, what to ignore and what to do next.
textPreview: Web3 users and partners can find data everywhere. The hard part is deciding what to trust, what to ignore and what to do next.

text: Market context, product claims, wallet state and community narratives arrive in different places.
textPreview: Market context, product claims, wallet state and community narratives arrive in different places.

text: Users need boundaries before conversion. They should understand limitations before action.
textPreview: Users need boundaries before conversion. They should understand limitations before action.

text: Many projects lead with documents or hype before showing a coherent product experience.
textPreview: Many projects lead with documents or hype before showing a coherent product experience.

text: L3AI's wedge is not more noise. It is a clearer journey from context to evaluation.
textPreview: L3AI's wedge is not more noise. It is a clearer journey from context to evaluation.

text: Frame the market pain without exaggerating. The claim is that L3AI helps organize public decision context and review flow, not that it predicts outcomes.
The public product experience is designed to help a reviewer understand the platform, its limits and the next qualified action.
textPreview: The public product experience is designed to help a reviewer understand the platform, its limits and the next qualified action.

text: Commercial implication: trusted context creates a better path to partner review, education-led community growth and product-qualified conversations.
textPreview: Commercial implication: trusted context creates a better path to partner review, education-led community growth and product-qualified con...

text: Explain the commercial logic in simple terms: L3AI should earn attention by reducing confusion first. The conversion path follows trust rather than promises.
The platform journey starts with proof, then moves to resources.
textPreview: The platform journey starts with proof, then moves to resources.

text: The live public site gives reviewers a route before asking them to open collateral.
textPreview: The live public site gives reviewers a route before asking them to open collateral.

text: Visitors see the live homepage, product proof and audience paths.
textPreview: Visitors see the live homepage, product proof and audience paths.

text: AI Quant, wallet-aware education, trust and roadmap pages explain the offer.
textPreview: AI Quant, wallet-aware education, trust and roadmap pages explain the offer.

text: Deck, whitepaper, video and media kit support the story instead of replacing it.
textPreview: Deck, whitepaper, video and media kit support the story instead of replacing it.

text: Public screenshot used from the live asset package.
textPreview: Public screenshot used from the live asset package.

text: Use this slide to connect the deck to the actual public site. The product story is not hypothetical because the screenshots and routes already exist in the public package.
The AI Quant experience is positioned as research context and explanation, not trading automation or performance advice.
textPreview: The AI Quant experience is positioned as research context and explanation, not trading automation or performance advice.

text: A guided research surface for market context, AI-assisted explanation and review language.
textPreview: A guided research surface for market context, AI-assisted explanation and review language.

text: No personalized investment advice, no trading execution, no claimed predictive certainty.
textPreview: No personalized investment advice, no trading execution, no claimed predictive certainty.

text: Emphasize the boundary. The workflow is valuable because it helps a reviewer understand context and limits before any action.
The wallet experience can explain asset context without exposing protected signing material or real balances in public materials.
textPreview: The wallet experience can explain asset context without exposing protected signing material or real balances in public materials.

text: Wallet-aware pages can educate around asset context while staying outside custody claims.
textPreview: Wallet-aware pages can educate around asset context while staying outside custody claims.

text: Public assets avoid real wallet signing material and protected account information.
textPreview: Public assets avoid real wallet signing material and protected account information.

text: The experience helps users understand what to review before qualified handoff.
textPreview: The experience helps users understand what to review before qualified handoff.

text: Keep this anchored in public-safe education. Do not imply that the public deck demonstrates real funds, signing, custody or user data.
The business story works because modules point to the same outcome: better review before action.
textPreview: The business story works because modules point to the same outcome: better review before action.

text: Keep public claims and risks visible.
textPreview: Keep public claims and risks visible.

text: Separate current, in-progress and planned capabilities.
textPreview: Separate current, in-progress and planned capabilities.

text: Route qualified partner or customer review.
textPreview: Route qualified partner or customer review.

text: One platform story beats a collection of disconnected assets.
textPreview: One platform story beats a collection of disconnected assets.

text: This slide is the connective tissue. It shows that the deck is about the existing product journey, not a list of separate files.
The matrix separates live capabilities from the roadmap.
textPreview: The matrix separates live capabilities from the roadmap.

text: Capability labels prevent the deck from presenting planned work as completed features.
textPreview: Capability labels prevent the deck from presenting planned work as completed features.

text: Point out that this is a control surface for truthful public language. It protects credibility by clearly separating what is current, what is being improved and what is planned.
The lifecycle keeps users moving without promising outcomes.
textPreview: The lifecycle keeps users moving without promising outcomes.

text: The user journey is designed around education, review and qualified handoff.
textPreview: The user journey is designed around education, review and qualified handoff.

text: Progression is a content and education path unless a future program is separately approved.
textPreview: Progression is a content and education path unless a future program is separately approved.

text: Avoid reward or payout language. The approved framing here is an education-led user lifecycle and a qualified review path.
The commercial model monetizes trusted product context.
textPreview: The commercial model monetizes trusted product context.

text: The business loop connects audience, experience, trust and partner review without relying on unsupported traction claims.
textPreview: The business loop connects audience, experience, trust and partner review without relying on unsupported traction claims.

text: Product experience creates trust. Trust improves review quality. Review quality supports partner and community growth.
textPreview: Product experience creates trust. Trust improves review quality. Review quality supports partner and community growth.

text: The commercial model should be expressed as a disciplined loop, not as revenue projections. If the audience asks for numbers, they belong in a separately approved financial model.
The deck can describe revenue categories, but it should not invent metrics or imply approved forecasts.
textPreview: The deck can describe revenue categories, but it should not invent metrics or imply approved forecasts.

text: Website, deck, whitepaper, FAQ, media kit
textPreview: Website, deck, whitepaper, FAQ, media kit

text: Qualified contact and enterprise use-case routing
textPreview: Qualified contact and enterprise use-case routing

text: Community learning paths and progression model
textPreview: Community learning paths and progression model

text: Repeatable content, asset and validation workflow
textPreview: Repeatable content, asset and validation workflow

text: Use this slide to keep commercial ambition public-safe. It shows how value could be packaged while avoiding unverifiable metrics or financial promises.
Progression is framed as education, not payout.
textPreview: Progression is framed as education, not payout.

text: Membership or progression logic should be shown only as an approved roadmap concept unless finalized for public launch.
textPreview: Membership or progression logic should be shown only as an approved roadmap concept unless finalized for public launch.

text: Users can follow public product pages, FAQ, resources and partner contact paths.
textPreview: Users can follow public product pages, FAQ, resources and partner contact paths.

text: Progression language can organize learning, review depth and community readiness.
textPreview: Progression language can organize learning, review depth and community readiness.

text: Any membership mechanics, tiers or incentives require separate approval before public claims.
textPreview: Any membership mechanics, tiers or incentives require separate approval before public claims.

text: This protects the brand from reward-style overclaims while preserving the future growth path.
textPreview: This protects the brand from reward-style overclaims while preserving the future growth path.

text: This is a conservative public framing. It keeps progression useful for product storytelling without turning it into a reward promise.
Community growth starts with useful review paths.
textPreview: Community growth starts with useful review paths.

text: The public experience can attract users, partners and media by helping each group complete a specific review job.
textPreview: The public experience can attract users, partners and media by helping each group complete a specific review job.

text: Understand the product and safety boundary before engagement.
textPreview: Understand the product and safety boundary before engagement.

text: Review the commercial story and route qualified conversations.
textPreview: Review the commercial story and route qualified conversations.

text: Use approved language, screenshots and resource links.
textPreview: Use approved language, screenshots and resource links.

text: Verify manifests, links and public asset completeness.
textPreview: Verify manifests, links and public asset completeness.

text: Keep the community story practical: growth begins with useful paths for different audiences, not with hype or incentive mechanics.
L3AI's content system can turn approved source facts into website pages, decks, video narratives, manifests and QA records.
textPreview: L3AI's content system can turn approved source facts into website pages, decks, video narratives, manifests and QA records.

text: Automation is valuable because it is controlled: source-backed, versioned and public-safe.
textPreview: Automation is valuable because it is controlled: source-backed, versioned and public-safe.

text: This slide describes the public asset engine, not protected system internals. It is about repeatable production and safety controls.
Video and media now follow the product story.
textPreview: Video and media now follow the product story.

text: The next promo narrative should move from product problem to user journey, commercial logic and review CTA.
textPreview: The next promo narrative should move from product problem to user journey, commercial logic and review CTA.

text: Confusing signals and weak trust slow Web3 decisions.
textPreview: Confusing signals and weak trust slow Web3 decisions.

text: Homepage, AI Quant, wallet education, resources and partner handoff.
textPreview: Homepage, AI Quant, wallet education, resources and partner handoff.

text: Use the deck, whitepaper, demo and contact path for controlled external review.
textPreview: Use the deck, whitepaper, demo and contact path for controlled external review.

text: Explain that the video package should stop feeling like a montage of static files. It should now follow the same product and commercial story as the deck.
Trust boundaries are a product feature.
textPreview: Trust boundaries are a product feature.

text: The strongest public story is disciplined about what L3AI does and does not claim.
textPreview: The strongest public story is disciplined about what L3AI does and does not claim.

text: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.
textPreview: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.

text: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.
textPreview: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.

text: No fake partner or traction metrics
textPreview: No fake partner or traction metrics

text: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.
textPreview: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.

text: No wallet signing in public media
textPreview: No wallet signing in public media

text: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.
textPreview: Public assets stay separated from protected systems.

text: Use this as the public safety anchor. The deck is more credible because it refuses to overclaim.
Roadmap language separates Current, In Progress and Planned.
textPreview: Roadmap language separates Current, In Progress and Planned.

text: A mature external deck makes status visible instead of letting audiences guess.
textPreview: A mature external deck makes status visible instead of letting audiences guess.

text: Do not let planned work sound complete. This slide gives the audience a plain status model.
GTM starts with the public site.
textPreview: GTM starts with the public site.

text: The launch motion routes audiences from public proof to the right resource and handoff.
textPreview: The launch motion routes audiences from public proof to the right resource and handoff.

text: This is a pragmatic go-to-market slide. It names the public channels without claiming external publication or paid-media results.
Partner paths start with controlled review.
textPreview: Partner paths start with controlled review.

text: The right next step is not a broad promise. It is a qualified review package and a clear owner path.
textPreview: The right next step is not a broad promise. It is a qualified review package and a clear owner path.

text: Review product fit, audience path and trust boundary.
textPreview: Review product fit, audience path and trust boundary.

text: Use approved screenshots, FAQ and public wording.
textPreview: Use approved screenshots, FAQ and public wording.

text: Assess production workflow, asset quality and governance.
textPreview: Assess production workflow, asset quality and governance.

text: Evaluate education-led growth paths and roadmap status.
textPreview: Evaluate education-led growth paths and roadmap status.

text: CTA: approve the 032 deck as the external story, then route partners through Resources and Contact.
textPreview: CTA: approve the 032 deck as the external story, then route partners through Resources and Contact.

text: The CTA is concrete. Approve this as the official external story and use the public site for routing.
The story is credible without invented metrics.
textPreview: The story is credible without invented metrics.

text: The deck relies on visible product surfaces, public artifacts, traceable manifests and explicit boundaries.
textPreview: The deck relies on visible product surfaces, public artifacts, traceable manifests and explicit boundaries.

text: Screenshots and pages already exist in the public package.
textPreview: Screenshots and pages already exist in the public package.

text: No outcome, funding, protected data or protected-system claims.
textPreview: No outcome, funding, protected data or protected-system claims.

text: PPTX, PDF, HTML, notes, previews and manifests are traceable.
textPreview: PPTX, PDF, HTML, notes, previews and manifests are traceable.

text: Current, In Progress and Planned language is separated.
textPreview: Current, In Progress and Planned language is separated.

text: This slide is important for investors and partners. The absence of fake metrics is a strength because the deck relies on evidence and boundaries.
The package is ready for controlled review, but final external use should follow product, legal and brand approvals.
textPreview: The package is ready for controlled review, but final external use should follow product, legal and brand approvals.

text: Confirm Resources links and asset package.
textPreview: Confirm Resources links and asset package.

text: This slide protects the launch process. It does not block the asset from being generated; it states the approval path before broad circulation.

title: Use the 032 package as the public story.

text: Use the 032 package as the public story.
textPreview: Use the 032 package as the public story.

text:
Open the product, review the business logic, verify the trust boundary, then route the right conversation.
打开产品、核查商业逻辑、确认边界，再进入合适的合作沟通。
textPreview: Open the product, review the business logic, verify the trust boundary, then route the right conversation. | 打开产品、核查商业逻辑、确认边界，再进入合适的合作沟通。

Resources: deck, PDF, HTML preview, speaker notes
Product: AI Quant, wallet, trust, roadmap
Contact: qualified partner or customer review

text: End with the action. This package should become the official external story and point audiences to the public Resources page for files.
